name: studio
description: Living agent team with quality hard floors, a local Context Kernel, and fenced optional external workflow handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Run a quality-gated living agent team with local context and optional external executors.
interface.longDescription: The owner gives a mission; Studio owns the mission, QualityPlan, Context Kernel, evidence-based completion, and owner gates. The producer convenes native ritual runs or hands a WorkPacket to one fenced optional external executor. ResultEnvelope evidence must satisfy artifact and context quality floors before utility or integration; task-github and wiki-markdown remain optional agent-visible providers rather than hard dependencies.
defaultPrompt: Use $producer to run a mission through the living agent team.
The producer convenes crew into background runs; it never makes artifacts itself.
Require artifact and context evidence to pass QualityPlan floors before integration.
Owner gates: mission contract, new epic, irreversible, external-publish, budget-raise.
